title: GlassPaneDoors
body:
This is a mod that adds doors crafted with glass panes.

![Glass pane door with glass blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efacf092f1f1f8f3012ba0398ef0725b04302853.jpeg)

![Stained glass pane doors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03267efaf7e738052e33ec4445f06c59ec5e9ee0.jpeg)
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6bcec8c30a1dc658ac2d8929494fa68a5a63ffb.jpeg)

**Recipe**: 3 Glass panes(Stained glass panes) + 3 wood planks
![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cc8f90b7660094fb7f589835649bc42f6896981.jpeg)

You can break the door with an **axe** to retrieve the original door block.

GitHub: [GitHub Link](https://github.com/neri347/fabric_glasspanedoors_1.21.1)
